title: POST-H-014-B — Response mapping y errores homogéneos

capabilities: Explicit CommandResult to ApplicationResponse HTTP mapping
Stack trace and raw exception message redaction for local API errors
limitations: Implemented-initial response mapping baseline, not final production API hardening.
UI route registry remains pending for POST-H-014-C.
Additional local security posture remains pending for POST-H-014-D.
Final UI/API quality gate remains pending for POST-H-014-E.
commands: python -m pytest -p no:ddtrace tests/test_post_h_014_response_mapping.py tests/test_api_local.py tests/test_api_security.py tests/test_api_approvals_actions.py tests/test_api_reports_traces.py tests/test_api_settings.py tests/test_post_h_014_api_route_contracts.py -q

python -m pytest -p no:ddtrace tests/test_schema_registry.py tests/test_project_global_state.py tests/test_test_contract_registry.py tests/test_test_contract_registry_v2.py tests/test_test_contract_registry_profiles_v2.py -q
python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_014_b_manifest.json --json
pass_criteria: BLOCK maps to HTTP 403 and is never reported as HTTP 200.
ERROR and unhandled exceptions map to HTTP 500 with stack traces redacted.
FastAPI request validation maps to ApplicationResponse HTTP 422.
Docs governance and test contract registries pass locally.
block_criteria: Unhandled exception leaks Traceback, secret material or raw exception messages.
Response mapping is duplicated ad hoc in routers instead of centralized in response_mapping.py.
risks: Implemented-initial mapping may require extension in POST-H-014-D/E for final API quality-gate enforcement.
Public transport routes remain local-only and intentionally unauthenticated.
The health endpoint keeps backward-compatible top-level fields while also adding ApplicationResponse envelope.
